features.title: Identity & Path Generalization
features.description: Replace all hardcoded Willie Kopp references and /Users/vault/ paths with dynamic helpers so the app works for any user.
features.notes: Includes Joe's 4 bug fixes from commits 08e4f02 and bb9c617.

features.title: Gmail Attachment Support
features.description: Add file attachment support to Gary's email tools so Gary can attach local files or Google Drive files to emails.
features.notes: Multipart MIME builder, local file reading, Drive download helper.

features.title: User-Selectable Output Folder (Local + Drive)
features.description: Replace single cowork.sharedFolderPath with flexible output destination supporting local folders and Google Drive.
features.notes: 12 files to update. Backward compatible with legacy setting.

features.title: Add get_setting / set_setting Tools
features.description: Give Gary the ability to read and write settings from chat.
features.notes: 15-minute fix. Phase 1A of intelligence upgrade plan.

features.title: Synchronous ask_cowork Tool
features.description: Let Gary dispatch a question to Cowork and get a text answer back inline.
features.notes: Intelligence multiplier. Phase 2 of upgrade plan.

features.title: Universal Spotlight Search (Command+K)
features.description: Transform Command+K from a command palette into a unified search-everything bar. Searches across all Gary data (emails, texts, loops, notes, contacts, calendar, dispatches) AND local files from configured search directories simultaneously. Results grouped by type with icons and contextual actions. Hybrid search: FTS5 for exact matches + sqlite-vec for semantic meaning. Proactive context surfacing — before meetings, during email composition, when contacts message you. This is the UI and search infrastructure that makes Gary's intelligence accessible in one keystroke.
features.notes: Phase 1: Unified search UI across all data sources with FTS5. Phase 2: Add semantic ranking when embedding engine is ready. Phase 3: Proactive context suggestions. The search bar every productivity app wishes it had.

features.title: Semantic Search Engine (Embeddings + Hybrid Retrieval)
features.description: Local-first semantic search engine powered by sqlite-vec and all-MiniLM embeddings via Ollama. Hybrid retrieval: runs FTS5 keyword search and vector similarity in parallel, combines scores with weighted fusion (70% vector + 30% FTS). Background indexing pipeline embeds all Gary data (emails, texts, notes, loops, files) on ingest. Cross-encoder reranking for top results. Zero cloud calls — all embeddings generated on-device using Apple Silicon. Graceful degradation to pure FTS5 if Ollama not installed. This is the intelligence layer that makes Universal Spotlight Search feel like Gary reads your mind.
features.notes: sqlite-vec extension for vector storage in existing SQLite DB. all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim) for fast embeddings via Ollama. Background indexing on data ingest. Optional mxbai-embed-large reranking for premium quality. Settings UI for model selection. Storage: ~500MB for typical user data. Query latency: 60-150ms.

features.title: AI Loop Priority Scoring
features.description: Dynamic urgency scoring using due-date proximity, email activity, calendar context.
features.notes: Numeric score alongside existing static urgency levels.

features.title: Contextual Email Reply Drafting
features.description: Auto-generate draft replies using thread context and relationship data.
features.notes: compose_smart_reply MCP tool built. Gary Draft button wired to MCP for live calendar context (4cffb29). callMcpTool export fix (ec355ef) unblocked the feature.

features.title: Predictive Meeting Prep Autopilot
features.description: Auto-trigger meeting prep 60 minutes before events with attendee intel.
features.notes: 80% built. Brief generation works. Missing: 60-minute pre-meeting cron trigger in cronEngine + Telegram push notification.

features.title: Ambient Intelligence & Proactive Push
features.description: Pattern detection on email velocity, loop staleness, calendar density.
features.notes: 40% built. gary_take and proactive_scan exist. Missing: email velocity analysis, calendar density warnings, proactive Telegram push, ambient background job scheduling.

features.title: Weekly Digest Polish
features.description: Polish output format and add trend comparison to previous weeks.
features.notes: Shipped. Context builder, trend comparison, Cowork export, Telegram notifications all wired.

features.title: Relationship & Project Knowledge Graph
features.description: Linked entity graph connecting People, Projects, Emails, Loops.
features.notes: Future architecture item.

features.title: PDF & Contract Intelligence
features.description: Ingest PDF attachments, extract key terms, auto-create Open Loops.
features.notes: Depends on attachment pipeline.

features.title: Intelligent Deep Work Block Scheduling
features.description: Reclaim.ai-style engine for proposing deep work blocks.
features.notes: Future architecture item.

features.title: Gary Self-Development Roadmap (DB + MCP)
features.description: SQLite roadmap_items table, MCP tools, focus enforcer, sprint planner.
features.notes: 6 phase prompts already built. Full playbook in roadmap-execution-order.md.

features.title: Self-Extending Platform (User Vibe-Codes Features)
features.description: Enable each user to extend Gary through natural language. User describes a capability they want, Gary dispatches to Code which creates the DB table, MCP tool, and UI wiring. Each user's Gary becomes uniquely shaped by their needs.
features.notes: North star vision. Requires: safe Code dispatch with rollback, dynamic MCP tool registration, per-user DB migration system, sandbox testing before activation. This is what separates Gary from every other AI assistant — the app evolves per user.

features.title: Configurable Search Directories & Recursive File Search
features.description: Rust search_files_recursive command (depth-limited BFS), search_local_files AI tool, configurable search directories in Settings > Files, recursive resolveFilename for email attachments.
features.notes: Gary can now find files in subdirectories across all configured search dirs. No DB migration needed.

features.title: Gary System Prompt: Drive & File Output Awareness
features.description: Added File Output & Google Drive section to Gary's system prompt so he knows Drive tools are built into his MCP server and stops hallucinating about external servers or Mac Mini requirements.
features.notes: Fixes Gary conflating Drive MCP with Mac Mini. Clarifies local output vs Drive shareable link routing.

features.title: Fix CPU Spike from MCP EOF Busy-Loop & Server Crash
features.description: Fixed Rust mcp.rs EOF busy-loop (1000%+ CPU), EmailCenter infinite re-render, orchestration.js duplicate imports, and DispatchDashboard timeout hardening.
features.notes: Merged PR #5. Root cause of MCP outage and CPU spikes.

features.title: Remove Remaining Hardcoded MCP Server Paths
features.description: Replaced all hardcoded /Users/vault/ MCP server fallback paths with dynamic getDefaultMcpServerPath() across 8 files.
features.notes: Merged PR #6. Continuation of PR #4 (mcpDefaults.js).

features.title: Gary Personality & System Prompt Audit & Redesign
features.description: Comprehensive audit and redesign of Gary's system prompt, personality, and behavioral constraints. Cowork audit found 19 system prompts across 14 files with 'Willie Kopp' hardcoded in 13 of them, 8 different personality definitions, and 60% of the main chat prompt consumed by operational procedures instead of personality. Goal: centralize identity into a shared garyIdentity.js module, trim chat prompt to personality-first with conditional operational blocks, standardize tone across all services, and make every prompt settings-driven for product readiness.
features.notes: Cowork audit complete (March 11). Modular system prompt architecture built (ce63d5a) — learned preferences integration. Remaining: centralize identity into garyIdentity.js, replace hardcoded names in 13 prompts with getUserName(), trim chat prompt operational bloat, standardize tone across services.

features.title: Proactive Email Triage & Missed Action Detection
features.description: Automated email classification and action detection. Scans for read-but-no-action emails, bounce detection, and creates Open Loops linked to email threads. Telegram push notifications for critical items. Runs every 3 hours with guardrails (8/day cap, 15min cooldown).
features.notes: Built by Gary (March 11, 2026). Migrations v44 (email_thread_id on loops) and v45 (scheduled task seed). Pattern-based classification — AI fallback planned for ambiguous emails.

features.title: MCP Stability: Stderr Capture & Path Resolution
features.description: Capture stderr from spawned MCP server processes for better error diagnostics. Fix dev-mode path resolution (strip /src-tauri suffix). Fix production path resolution (scan common dev directories when cwd is /).
features.notes: Root cause: get_project_root() used current_dir() which returns / in production .app builds. Now scans $HOME/Developer/Active/willieOS etc. as fallback.

features.title: Dashboard UI Refresh — New Shell, Sidebar, Home View
features.description: Complete UI overhaul: new AppShell with icon-rail SidebarNav, fixed-layout HomeView (greeting, FocusCard, GarySuggestions, Timeline, InboxSummary), redesigned IntelligencePanel with active agents dock + activity feed + daily spend sparkline + quick actions, navigation store for tab routing, shared Card/SectionHeader components. Matches v0.dev reference designs.
features.notes: Shell and home view built (0795b8f). 5 rounds of feedback addressed — light mode, agent overlay, header overlap, click handlers. Background email preload added (ec355ef). Remaining: verify all tabs work, polish animations.

features.title: Dispatch Chain Auto-Trigger & Workflow Fixes
features.description: Fix dispatch chains not auto-triggering after completion. Root cause: ingestResult() never called saveDispatchMemory(), so checkDependencyChain() never fired. Also implement chain_dispatch post-completion action and verify result delivery to AI chat.
features.notes: Shipped on main. Auto-memory save, chain_dispatch action with interpolation, result delivery, dynamic chain composition, deliverable links all working. publish_to_github_pages still stubbed.

features.title: iMessage Integration — Text Message Triage & Loop Creation
features.description: Read iMessages from the local macOS chat.db, surface actionable texts in Gary's context, and auto-create Open Loops from them — mirroring the email triage pipeline. Phase 1: read-only connector that queries ~/Library/Messages/chat.db (SQLite) for recent messages, extracts sender/body/timestamp, and feeds them to Gary for triage. Phase 2: AI triage job that scans new messages, detects action items, and creates Open Loops with source_type='imessage'. Phase 3: optional Telegram push notifications for important texts.
features.notes: Full iMessage UI built: ConversationList, ThreadView, DraftCard, Rust imessage.rs connector. Read-only from ~/Library/Messages/chat.db. Gary auto-drafts replies with reasoning. Conversation highlight, compose auto-grow, reasoning stripping at consumption. Remaining: AI triage job for auto-loop creation, Telegram push for important texts.

features.title: Better UI for loop started from email
features.description: When a loop is email-sourced, show the email subject, sender, date, and a snippet on the loop card/detail view — not just 'started on an email'.
features.notes: Feature idea from Joe (PR #8).

features.title: Image & File Uploads in Gary Chat
features.description: Support drag-drop, paste, or paperclip button for images and text-based documents (.md, .txt, .json, .csv, etc.) in Gary chat. Images sent via base64 vision, documents read as text and prepended to message.
features.notes: Originally Joe's idea (PR #8). Image support built earlier, text file attachment support added March 25, 2026. Supports paste, drag-drop, and file picker.

features.title: PPTX Verticalization Skill — V2 ZIP-Surgery Method
features.description: Complete rewrite of pptx-verticalization skill using ZIP-level binary surgery (NEVER python-pptx open/save). Replaces images (Pexels API, dimension-exact) and text (XML <a:t> tags only) while preserving all layout, formatting, animations. Proven at enterprise scale: ServiceNow Sports→Healthcare for MD Anderson (41 images, 50 text changes, 19 slides, 94.7MB output). Reference implementation: /Users/vault/spence-deck/surgical_replace.py
features.notes: Installed alongside 15 ecosystem skills (01-self-improving-agent through 15-agent-designer). All ecosystem skills were already present. V2 method replaces the old python-pptx edit-in-place approach that corrupted formatting. Gary routing updated to always dispatch to Claude Code (requires Python execution).
